changelog:
THE HANDSHAKE PATCH V3.0.6:
- [FEATURE] The Handshake Protocol: Added a smart notification system (Alerts) inside the Console for incoming Mutual requests and Direct Messages (Laser Links).
- [FEATURE] Hologram Image FX: Attached media on the timeline now features a tactical cyberpunk visual filter.
- [FIX] Anti-Self Loop: The Star Chart radar will now actively reject attempts to lock onto your own station's coordinates.
- [UI/UX] Added the blinking Ghost Protocol badge to the Public Hologram (index.php) for better visitor visibility.
